name: sushi-bar
description: Small, bite-sized Claude Code tools for native Windows, by sushiHex.

plugins.name: snip
plugins.description: Screenshot capture (box/screen/window/clipboard) that loads the shot straight into your Claude Code session.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Rich status line: session · git branch, model, context bar, 5h/7d usage-limit trackers, and dir.
